items.claim: Abdul Hussein is an undersized bantamweight at 5 foot 5.
items.quote: I think Abdullah Hussein just in general is a very undized bantamweight. This guy is 5 foot five and you can see it in his fights

items.claim: Cody Gibson is taking the fight on short notice and traveling from the United States to Abu Dhabi.
items.quote: Cody Gibson is taking this on short notice and also Cody Gibson not only needs to take the fight on short notice, make the weight on short notice, he also needs to go from the United States to Abu Dhabi

items.claim: Cody Gibson has issues with cardio.
items.quote: One of which I've always worried about, that's the cardio.

items.claim: Cody Gibson was knocked out by Archie Colgan in 21 seconds in his last fight.
items.quote: he did get knocked out by Archie Long at only 21 seconds in his last one.

items.claim: Abdul Hussein has a very bad takedown accuracy.
items.quote: he does shoot a lot of takedowns, but he has a very, very bad takedown accuracy.

items.claim: Mike Davis is a black belt in Brazilian jiu-jitsu and a very good wrestler.
items.quote: he actually has a lot of talent. He's a black belt in Brazilian jiu-jitsu. He's a very good wrestler.

items.claim: Nurullo Aliev has a sneaky good jab.
items.quote: Ali's best part of his game is actually the jab which is pretty sneaky.

items.claim: Mike Davis is the better striker and better pure BJJ practitioner in the matchup.
items.quote: I would argue Davis is the better um striker in the matchup. I would argue that Davis like when it comes to the pure BJJ is better too.

items.claim: Muslim Salikhov is a good fighter who knocked out Caio Machado.
items.quote: he did knock out Kaio Mashado... Tuchelov put him out pretty bad with just one punch

items.claim: Brenson Rivero has power and a really good level of finishing ability.
items.quote: Brenson Rivero is probably someone that you can just look at and you can just say he sucks. He's really bad. Well, he just has power. He has a really good level of finishing ability.
